OUR STORY

THE ORIGIN

Passion in Every Pour.

Amy Burgess-Brown started Espresso Self with a simple goal: to serve the Malabar community artisan-quality coffee without the long waits or high prices. What began as a dream for a mobile coffee haven has grown into a 4.9-star neighborhood staple.

THE COMMUNITY

Part of the Morning Ritual.

When you visit us at 775 Malabar Rd, you're not just a customer; you're part of the morning ritual. From Amy’s custom flavor creations to Mia’s steady hand in the kitchen, we take pride in making every sandwich and cold brew exactly the way you like it—fresh and with a smile.

THE COMMITMENT

More Than Just a Quick Bite.

We don’t cut corners. Whether it’s our famous candied bacon, our velvety nitro cold brew, or our loaded breakfast burritos, we use high-quality ingredients because we believe Malabar deserves the best start to its day.

AMY’S
ESPRESSO
SELF
CRAFTED WITH SOUL

775 Malabar Rd
Malabar, FL 32950, United States
